tasks.subject: Task 1: Vendor shadcn-vue Sidebar primitive (+ deps) into ui/
tasks.description:
**Goal:** sidebar + sheet/tooltip/separator/skeleton under components/ui/ via CLI fence, token-reconciled (--sidebar-* → Sunken/Ink/Tide), no markup hand-edits.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/components/ui/sidebar","dashboard/src/components/ui/sheet","dashboard/src/components/ui/tooltip","dashboard/src/components/ui/separator","dashboard/src/components/ui/skeleton","dashboard/src/assets/main.css"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npm run build && grep -c '<style' ../pkg/webui/dist/index.html","acceptanceCriteria":["CLI writes only under ui/","--sidebar-* mapped onto tokens; OKLCH + --accent-off-Ember preserved","build exit 0; dist index.html zero <style>"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Sudo gate — lib/sudo.ts + SudoModal.vue
tasks.description:
**Goal:** withSudo/ensureSudo singleton + SudoModal ceremony (passkey + password/TOTP) on the verified /me/sudo/* contract; unit + flow tests; en.ts sudo namespace + sudo_method_unavailable.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/lib/sudo.ts","dashboard/src/lib/sudo.test.ts","dashboard/src/components/custom/SudoModal.vue","dashboard/src/components/custom/SudoModal.test.ts","dashboard/src/locales/en.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npm run test","acceptanceCriteria":["withSudo retry-once on sudo_required; rethrow on cancel/non-sudo","passkey + password/TOTP paths resolve true; cancel false; empty methods terminal","tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Shell — DashboardLayout + AppSidebar + StatusBadge
tasks.description:
**Goal:** DashboardLayout (SidebarProvider+Sidebar+Inset, mounts SudoModal once, RouterView) + config-driven AppSidebar (brand header, Account nav built-links, footer identity+logout→/logout, admin group gated on isAdmin) + StatusBadge (neutral/success/caution/danger). Keep primitive's collapse/drawer/tooltip/a11y.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/pages/DashboardLayout.vue","dashboard/src/components/custom/AppSidebar.vue","dashboard/src/components/custom/AppSidebar.test.ts","dashboard/src/components/custom/StatusBadge.vue","dashboard/src/locales/en.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npm run test && npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["layout mounts SudoModal once; sidebar behavior intact","AppSidebar config-driven; brand = sole Ember; footer logout→/logout; admin group hidden when !isAdmin","StatusBadge variants render"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Pages — ProfileView + SessionsView + route wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** read-only ProfileView (/) from auth.me; SessionsView (/sessions) GET /me/sessions list + POST /me/sessions/revoke{id} (current not revocable); nested /-layout route under DashboardLayout with meta.requiresAuth; en.ts profile.*/sessions.*.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/pages/ProfileView.vue","dashboard/src/pages/ProfileView.test.ts","dashboard/src/pages/SessionsView.vue","dashboard/src/pages/SessionsView.test.ts","dashboard/src/router/index.ts","dashboard/src/locales/en.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npm run test && npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["profile read-only (no inputs/buttons)","sessions list; only non-current revocable; revoke posts {id} + refresh","/ layout route requiresAuth → guard redirects to /login"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Done-gate — CSP/embed check, rebuild dist, smoke
tasks.description:
**Goal:** confirm no inline <script>/<style> in shell, rebuild+commit dist, full gate green (go build/vet/test, vitest, smoke SMOKE_EXIT=0; step 5b /,/sessions serve shell), runtime spot-check the auth loop.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/webui/dist"],"verifyCommand":"setsid bash /tmp/run_v06.sh; cat /tmp/v06.result","acceptanceCriteria":["dist/index.html zero inline <script>/<style>","go build/vet/test exit 0; vitest green; build clean","smoke SMOKE_EXIT=0","dist committed"]}
```
